allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe"\); $paths | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { $_ } }; Get-Command nvm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Source; \(Get-ChildItem "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count)
